parameters: \n<Elovia>I've never seen plants like these before.\.\. Even by today's standards they're...\.\. odd.

\n<Elovia>I would, but this annoying little man keeps on bugging me.
You can now configure Elovia's 1st Skill using the item under the Config tab or by pressing '1'.
You can now configure Yurasa's 1st Skill using the item under the Config tab or by pressing 'R'.
You can choose from one of three Skills to "equip" for each of the main characters, Elovia and Yurasa.
As you level up, you'll unlock more and more Skills to choose from.
As an example: with Elovia, you can currently choose one of the three following Skills: \is[4], \is[5] and \is[6].
All three of these Skills have different functions and uses.
Building up more and more Skills to choose from by leveling up can allow you to experiment with different Skill combinations.
